sourceNote: Sefaria Yerushalmi is structured by chapter/halakhah/segment. This prototype anchors daf ב to the opening halakhah where the Venice Columns overlay marks 2a.
title: Four Avot of Damages
subtitle: The Yerushalmi opens Nezikin by defining the core categories of liability.

slides.title: The whole sugya in one sentence
body: The Mishnah lists four primary damage categories, then the Yerushalmi begins identifying each one from the pesukim.
The point is not just naming cases. It is building a framework for when a person becomes responsible for damage caused by his property or actions.

columns.label: השור
columns.text: The ox, understood here as keren: goring damage.

columns.label: הבור
columns.text: The pit, damage caused by a hazard someone created.

columns.label: המבעה
columns.text: A category the Bavli debates. The Yerushalmi’s framing needs careful tracking.

columns.label: ההבער
columns.text: Fire, damage that spreads from a person’s force or property.

slides.title: How the Mishnah reasons
steps: Each av has a distinct feature.
No single category can teach all the others.
The common denominator: דרכן להזיק, their normal way is to cause damage.
Because שמירתן עליך, guarding them is your responsibility.
When they damage, the mazikin pays from מיטב הארץ.

slides.title: Source anchor
slides.hebrew: אַרְבָּעָה אָבוֹת נְזִיקִין: הַשּׁוֹר וְהַבּוֹר וְהַמַּבְעֶה וְהַהֶבְעֵר... הַצַּד הַשָּׁוֶה שֶׁבָּהֶן שֶׁדַּרְכָּן לְהַזִּיק וּשְׁמִירָתָן עָלֶיךָ...
slides.english: There are four main categories of damages: the bull, the pit, the maveh, and the fire... Their common denominator is that their way is to cause damage and their guarding is upon you.

slides.title: Yerushalmi-specific note
slides.body: The first technical issue for this project is pagination. The Yerushalmi API does not behave like Bavli daf/amud refs. The build pipeline should map Sefaria chapter/halakhah segments to the printed Yerushalmi page markers before generating all pages.

quiz.q: What are the four avot listed in the opening Mishnah?
quiz.e: The Mishnah’s list is השור, הבור, המבעה, וההבער.

quiz.q: What is the shared principle tying the avot together?
o: They normally cause damage and must be guarded
They only apply in private property
They are all paid as fines
quiz.e: The Mishnah says דרכן להזיק ושמירתן עליך.

quiz.q: What is the prototype’s main technical caution?
o: Yerushalmi API refs are chapter/halakhah, not simple Bavli daf refs
quiz.e: Refs such as 1:1 are reliable; daf/page mapping needs to use overlay markers.
